    53	function getSelectionState(selection: RangeSelection): ToolbarState {
    54	  const nodes = selection.getNodes()
    55	  const hasLink = nodes.some((node: LexicalNode) => {

    61	    isBold: selection.hasFormat('bold'),
    62	    isItalic: selection.hasFormat('italic'),
    63	    isUnderline: selection.hasFormat('underline'),
    64	    isStrikethrough: selection.hasFormat('strikethrough'),
    65	    isCode: selection.hasFormat('code'),
    66	    isHighlight: selection.hasFormat('highlight'),
    67	    isLink: hasLink,
    68	    fontColor: $getSelectionStyleValueForProperty(selection, 'color', ''),
    69	  }
    70	}
    71	
    72	function computePosition(
    73	  nativeSelection: Selection,
    74	  toolbar: HTMLElement,
    75	): { top: number; left: number } | null {
    76	  const range = nativeSelection.getRangeAt(0)
    77	  const rect = range.getBoundingClientRect()
    78	  if (rect.width === 0 && rect.height === 0) return null
    79	
    80	  const toolbarWidth = toolbar.offsetWidth
    81	  const toolbarHeight = toolbar.offsetHeight
    82	
    83	  const rawLeft = rect.left + rect.width / 2 - toolbarWidth / 2 + window.scrollX
    84	  const clampedLeft = Math.max(
    85	    8,
    86	    Math.min(rawLeft, window.innerWidth - toolbarWidth - 8 + window.scrollX),
    87	  )
    88	
    89	  return {
    90	    top: rect.top - toolbarHeight - 10 + window.scrollY,
    91	    left: clampedLeft,
    92	  }
    93	}

    18	export interface SlashMenuPluginProps {

    32	
    33	export function collectNodeSlashItems(editor: LexicalEditor): SlashMenuItem[] {
    34	  const items: SlashMenuItem[] = []
    35	  const nodes: Map<string, { klass: any }> = (editor as any)._nodes
    36	  for (const { klass } of nodes.values()) {
    37	    const configs: SlashMenuItemConfig[] | undefined = klass.slashMenuItems
    38	    if (configs) {
    39	      for (const config of configs) {
    40	        items.push(new SlashMenuItemClass(config.title, config))
    41	      }
    42	    }
    43	  }
    44	  return items
    45	}
    46	
    47	function filterItems(query: string, items: SlashMenuItem[]): SlashMenuItem[] {
    48	  if (!query) return items
    49	  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
    50	  return items.filter((item) => {
    51	    if (item.title.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return true
    52	    return item.keywords.some((kw) => kw.toLowerCase().includes(lower))
    53	  })
    54	}
    55	
    56	export function SlashMenuPlugin({
    57	  items,
    58	  extraItems,
    59	  triggerChar = '/',
    60	}: SlashMenuPluginProps) {
    61	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    62	  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)
    63	
    64	  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    65	    if (items) return items
    66	    const builtins = getBuiltinItems()
    67	    const nodeItems = collectNodeSlashItems(editor)
    68	    const combined = [...builtins, ...nodeItems]
    69	    return extraItems ? [...combined, ...extraItems] : combined
    70	  }, [items, extraItems, editor])
    71	
    72	  const filteredItems = useMemo(
    73	    () => filterItems(queryString ?? '', allItems),
    74	    [queryString, allItems],
    75	  )
    76	
    77	  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(triggerChar, {
    78	    minLength: 0,
    79	  })
    80	
    81	  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    82	    (
    83	      option: SlashMenuItem,
    84	      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
    85	      closeMenu: () => void,
    86	      matchingString: string,
    87	    ) => {
    88	      editor.update(() => {
    89	        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
    90	          const selection = $getSelection()
    91	          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
    92	            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
    93	          }
    94	        }
    95	      })
    96	      closeMenu()
    97	      option.onSelect(editor, matchingString)
    98	    },
    99	    [editor],
   100	  )
   101	
   102	  return (
   103	    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<SlashMenuItem>
   104	      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
   105	      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
   106	      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
   107	      options={filteredItems}
   108	      menuRenderFn={(
   109	        anchorElementRef,
   110	        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
   111	      ) => {
   112	        if (!anchorElementRef.current || filteredItems.length === 0) {
   113	          return null
   114	        }
   115	        return createPortal(
   116	          <PortalThemeWrapper>
   117	            <SlashMenuList
   118	              options={filteredItems}
   119	              selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
   120	              selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
   121	              setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
   122	            />
   123	          </PortalThemeWrapper>,
   124	          anchorElementRef.current,
   125	        )
   126	      }}
   127	    />
   128	  )
   129	}

   102	function getBlockElement(
   103	  editor: LexicalEditor,
   104	  target: HTMLElement,
   105	): HTMLElement | null {
   106	  const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   107	  if (!rootElement) return null
   108	  let current: HTMLElement | null = target
   109	  while (current && current !== rootElement) {
   110	    if (current.parentElement === rootElement) return current
   111	    current = current.parentElement
   112	  }
   113	  return null
   114	}
   115	
   116	function toPagePosition(rect: DOMRect) {
   117	  return {
   118	    top: rect.top + window.scrollY,
   119	    left: rect.left + window.scrollX,
   120	  }
   121	}
   122	
   123	function $cloneNode(node: import('lexical').LexicalNode): import('lexical').LexicalNode {
   124	  const Klass = node.constructor as any
   125	  const serialized = node.exportJSON()
   126	  const clone = Klass.importJSON(serialized)
   127	  if ($isElementNode(node) && $isElementNode(clone)) {
   128	    for (const child of node.getChildren()) {
   129	      clone.append($cloneNode(child))
   130	    }
   131	  }
   132	  return clone
   133	}

    35	  }

    43	  if (/^(rgb|hsl)a?\([^)]+\)$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    44	  if (/^[a-z]{3,20}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    45	  return undefined

    14	    : never
    15	}
    16	
    17	type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18	  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19	    RendererConfig[K]
    20	  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21	    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22	    : never
    23	}
    24	
    25	export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26	  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27	    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28	    rendererKey: K
    29	    /** Default renderer component */
    30	    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31	    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32	    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33	  }
    34	}[RendererKey]
    35	
    36	/**
    37	 * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38	 * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39	 */
    40	export function RendererWrapper({
    41	  rendererKey,
    42	  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43	  props,
    44	}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45	  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46	  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47	
    48	  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49	}
    50	
    51	/**
    52	 * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53	 * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54	 */
    55	export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56	  rendererKey: K,
    57	  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58	  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59	): ReactElement {
    60	  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61	    rendererKey,
    62	    defaultRenderer,
    63	    props,
    64	  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65	}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-20 07:16:31Z)**_

**Findings**
1. `Medium` `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:446` and `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:464`  
`dropLine.visible` is set during `DRAGOVER_COMMAND` but only cleared in `DROP_COMMAND`. If drag is canceled (Esc) or ends outside the editor, the drop indicator can stay stuck. Add cleanup on drag end/leave (for example `DRAGEND_COMMAND`).

2. `Medium` `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:225`, `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:290`, `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:301`  
When there is no active block, `updatePositionFromBlock()` still calls `setHandle(...)` with a new object. Because this function is triggered on every editor update and scroll/resize, it causes unnecessary rerenders during typing/scrolling.

3. `Medium` `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:265`  
`if (block && !block.hasAttribute('contenteditable'))` filters out blocks that have `contenteditable="false"`. That can exclude non-editable/decorator block roots from showing block handles, which is likely not intended for media/embed-style nodes.

4. `Low` `packages/rich-plugin-slash-menu/src/SlashMenuPlugin.tsx:35`, `packages/rich-plugin-block-handle/src/BlockHandlePlugin.tsx:307`  
`collectNodeSlashItems()` relies on `editor._nodes` (private Lexical internals) and is now exported/consumed by another package. This increases upgrade risk with Lexical version changes.

**Open Question**
1. Is excluding `contenteditable="false"` blocks intentional? If not, finding #3 should be treated as a functional bug.

No obvious event-listener leak was found; cleanup/unregister paths are present for the listeners and Lexical commands.  
Type check also passed with `pnpm -C packages/rich-plugin-block-handle exec tsc --noEmit`.
